Resolve Version to data_sha

Source: R/read_write.R
dot-datom_resolve_version.Rd

Given metadata from .datom_read_metadata(), resolves a version spec to the corresponding data_sha. If version is NULL, returns the current data_sha from metadata.json. If a metadata_sha string, looks it up in version_history.json.

Usage

.datom_resolve_version(metadata_list, version = NULL, name = "table")

Arguments

metadata_list

Return value of .datom_read_metadata().

version

NULL (current) or a metadata_sha string.

name

Table name (for error messages).

Value

Character string data_sha.
